title: Implement user-defined SOUL personas alongside the c-suite (ADR-2026-05-13-1849)

tasks.title: Add UserPersona table to spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/lib.rs with fields name (primary_key String), soul_hash (String, SHA-256), created_at (Timestamp), last_used_at (Option<Timestamp>), tools_override (Option<String> JSON), tier_models_override (Option<String> JSON). Mark public.

Add reducers user_persona_create(name, soul_hash, tools_override, tier_models_override), user_persona_delete(name), user_persona_touch(name, now), user_persona_update_soul(name, soul_hash) with collision check against persona_pool. Reject names matching built-in c-suite or IC role identifiers.
Republish hexflo-coordination module and verify new table is queryable via hex stdb tables.
evidence: curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3033/v1/database/hex/sql -H 'Content-Type: text/plain' -d 'SELECT name FROM user_persona LIMIT 1' | grep -v error

tasks.title: Create hex-cli/src/commands/persona.rs with clap subcommand definitions for Create, Delete, List, Show. Name validation regex ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{0,63}$. Wire into hex-cli/src/main.rs top-level clap structure as 'persona' command.

Implement hex persona create <name> --soul <path>: read SOUL file, compute SHA-256, write to ~/.hex/personas/<name>/SOUL.md, call user_persona_create reducer via nexus REST. Reject if persona_pool name collision.
Implement hex persona list (shows c-suite + user-personas in two sections), hex persona show <name> (SOUL preview, tools/tier overrides), hex persona delete <name> (removes directory + STDB row).

phases.title: SOUL.md security scan — prompt injection + invisible Unicode

tasks.title: Create hex-core/src/security/soul_scan.rs with fn scan_soul(content: &str) -> Result<(), SoulScanError> that rejects: (1) regex matches for (?i)ignore (previous|all|prior) instructions, (2) (?i)you are now , (3) invisible Unicode codepoints U+200B/U+200C/U+200D/U+2060/U+FEFF/U+E0000-U+E007F, (4) content over 64 KB.
Add 6 unit tests for soul_scan: passes clean content, rejects ignore-instructions, rejects you-are-now jailbreak, rejects zero-width space, rejects 65KB content, accepts 60KB content.
evidence: cargo test -p hex-core soul_scan -- --list | grep -c test

tasks.title: Wire scan_soul into hex persona create and hex persona install — reject the create/install with SoulScanError details surfaced to the operator.

phases.title: Org-comms routing branch — user_persona DM path

tasks.title: In hex-nexus/src/routes/org_comms.rs::route_to_agent, add early branch: if the to field matches a user_persona row in STDB, route to deliver_dm_to_user_persona (NO board-meeting broadcast, NO atomic-claim mediation). Falls through to existing c-suite path otherwise.

Implement deliver_dm_to_user_persona: creates thread dm-<persona>-<sender> if absent, posts the message to it, calls user_persona_touch on STDB to update last_used_at, triggers the user_persona_responder (P5) to generate a reply.

phases.title: User-persona responder — variant of org_responder without atomic-claim

tasks.title: Create hex-nexus/src/orchestration/user_persona_responder.rs as a variant of org_responder. Reads ~/.hex/personas/<name>/SOUL.md for slot 1 of system prompt. Reads tools.yml + tier_models.yml from same directory for tool/model overrides. NO atomic claim_persona_turn call — user-personas have no peers to coordinate with.

Wire user_persona_responder into the typed-tool dispatch path the c-suite uses. Tool allowlist defaults to full library minus delegation/clarify/memory (same exclusions as Hermes subagent delegation).

Create hex-nexus/assets/src/components/views/CustomPersonas.tsx — Solid+Tailwind component subscribed to user_persona STDB table. Renders one card per persona with name, SOUL preview (first 200 chars), tool override badges, last_used_at relative time. Compose box at top mirrors the existing c-suite tree compose box.

Wire CustomPersonas into the dashboard navigation. Route at #/personas/custom. Update hex-nexus/assets/src/App.tsx or equivalent router file. Rebuild the embedded assets with cargo build -p hex-nexus.
evidence: cargo build -p hex-nexus 2>&1 | grep -v warning | tail -1

tasks.title: Implement hex persona install <git-url> [--alias <name>]: git clone --depth 1 to a tempdir, validate SOUL.md present, run scan_soul (P3.1), copy to ~/.hex/personas/<name>/. --alias creates ~/.local/bin/<name> symlink pointing to hex wrapper that sets HEX_PERSONA_DEFAULT=<name>.
Implement hex persona update <name>: refreshes the persona directory from its origin git remote (stored in ~/.hex/personas/<name>/.origin), preserving local edits via git stash + pop.

Implement hex persona publish <name> --to github --repo <owner/name>: initializes the persona dir as a git repo if not already, commits, pushes to the named remote. Strips credentials/memories from the publish.

phases.title: End-to-end smoke test — create, route, delete

tasks.title: Smoke test script scripts/smoke-user-persona.sh: hex persona create test-bot --soul /tmp/smoke-soul.md (where smoke-soul.md is a minimal valid SOUL), curl POST /api/org/send-message {to:test-bot,from:operator,content:hello,subject:smoke}, verify a response message appears in agent_comms table for thread dm-test-bot-operator, hex persona delete test-bot, verify ~/.hex/personas/test-bot/ and user_persona row are gone.
